sql_array: CREATE FUNCTION my_add(x integer, y integer) RETURNS integer EXTERNAL NAME my_functions.'addNumbers';
CREATE FUNCTION my_length(s string) RETURNS integer EXTERNAL NAME my_functions.'stringLength';
SELECT my_length(column_name) FROM my_table WHERE column2 = 'Test';
UPDATE my_table SET column1 = my_add(column1, 10) WHERE column2 = 'Test';
